title: astragalus stella
intro: Astragalus stella, also known as Chinese milkvetch, is a type of flowering plant in the pea family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus stella include improved immune function, reduced stress and fatigue, and enhanced cardiovascular health, making it a popular herbal remedy for preventing illnesses such as the common cold and flu. Astragalus stella can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
